topics.name: ND I & ND II: Bookkeeping, Financial Accounting & Business Communication (IMT)
topics.description: ACC 111 Financial Accounting I, ACC 121 Principles of Business, BUS 111 Business Communication.

subtopics.name: ACC 111 & ACC 121: Bookkeeping and Principles of Business at IMT Enugu
objectives: Record business transactions using double-entry principles in cash books, journals, and ledgers
Prepare final accounts for sole traders including income statements and balance sheets with adjustments

subtopics.name: BUS 111: Business Communication and Office Procedures
objectives: Write business letters, memos, reports, and emails in correct format for Nigerian business environments
Describe office organisation, filing systems, and business communication channels used in Enugu State enterprises

topics.name: HND I & HND II: Management Accounting, Taxation, Auditing & IMT Project
topics.description: ACC 311 Cost & Management Accounting, ACC 321 Nigerian Taxation, ACC 411 Auditing, ACC 499 HND Project.

subtopics.name: ACC 311 & ACC 321: Management Accounting and Taxation at IMT
objectives: Prepare budgets, standard cost statements, and variance analyses for manufacturing and trading businesses
Calculate personal income tax, companies income tax, and VAT for Nigerian small and medium enterprises

subtopics.name: ACC 499: IMT Accountancy HND Final Year Project
objectives: Conduct an accounting-based case study or empirical research on a business in Enugu or South-East Nigeria
Present and defend HND project report before the NBTE and IMT School of Business & Management Technology
